title: Divinity
description: Divinity is a private, lore-driven Minecraft SMP where gods rule their own dimensions and mortals live under them. Pick an origin, build your life, and figure out where you stand.
body:
# DIVINITY
### A Private Live SMP

---

> The gods are watching. Try not to give them a reason.

---

## **Disclaimer**

This modpack is specifically for members of the Divinity SMP. We use this project as an easy way to push updates, fixes, and changes directly through the Modrinth Launcher. This project was not posted to seek attention or profit, it exists solely to make the experience as smooth as possible for our 25+ members. All credit goes to the original mod developers.


## Overview

**Divinity** is a private, lore-driven Minecraft SMP set in a world where the line between the divine and the mortal is not a metaphor. It is a border you can cross.

---
**The gods rule.** Each one commands a dimension of their own making. A realm shaped by their will, their aesthetic, their cruelty or their kindness. They descend when they please, and reshape the world around their whims. Godhood comes with real power. Dimension ownership and the authority to set the terms of their dimension.

**The mortals endure.** They build their cities and forge alliances. Some pray to the divine while others plot with them. Although, Equipped with their ancestral bloodline (Origins) and the infamous MacGuffin. Mortals are never as powerless as the gods would like to believe.

---

## Factions

### The Gods
Each god commands a dimension, They hold the power of origin, of blessing and curse, of catastrophe and gift. They may descend, observe, interfere, and demand. But godhood does not equal immunity. A god who oversteps may find their equals and inferiors... formidable.

### The Mortals
Resourceful, resilient, and opinionated. Mortals navigate a world shaped by forces larger than themselves. They mingle with gods when it suits them, grumble about them when it doesn't. They build kingdoms from stone and pride, form guilds and factions, and debate whether the gods are doing a good job. Not enemies. Not servants. Just people trying to live their lives under someone else's sky.

---

## The World

The overworld is vast and mostly ungoverned. Overhauled dungeons, desert temples, ocean monuments, strongholds, leftovers from an older age worth raiding if you're brave enough. Biomes O' Plenty fills the map with places worth actually living in, and Immersive Portals makes the gods' dimensions feel like neighboring countries rather than unreachable myths. Step through and you're there no ceremony, just a change of atmosphere.

---

## Gameplay

Every player starts by choosing an Origin. It shapes how you move, survive, and interact with the world around you. Gods get extended perks tied to their dimension. Everyone else makes do with what they've got, which turns out to be quite a lot.

| Category | Mod Highlights |
|---|---|
| ⚔ Combat | Arsenal and Origins |
| ⚙ Engineering | Create, Tinkers' Construct, Immersive Aircraft |
| ✦ Magic | Bewitchment and Trinkets |
| 🎶 Culture | Immersive Melodies, Simple Radio, Emotecraft |
| 🗺 Exploration | YUNG's Suite, Biomes O' Plenty, Dungeons & Taverns |

Death is tracked. Gravestones mark where you fell. Voice chat means someone probably heard it happen.

---

## The Texture of Life

Divinity isn't just politics and power struggles. Most days it's just life. Brew something with Farmer's Delight, furnish a house with Handcrafted and Chipped, or set up a storage system that actually makes sense with Tom's Simple Storage. Fly somewhere with Immersive Aircraft. Start a radio station. Write a song. Build something worth defending.
Custom skins, capes, and nicknames are allowed meaning everyone can be their unique selfs here and express themselves with Emotecraft.

---

## System Requirements
> You don't need a powerhouse to run the Divinity Modpack, but you do need to allocate at least **8GB of RAM** to Minecraft before launching. The modpack will not start otherwise.

If you're not sure how to allocate RAM, ask before your first session and someone can walk you through it.

---

## Details

- **Version:** Fabric 1.20.1
- **Access:** Private invite only
- **Type:** Lore-driven roleplay

---

*Divinity is what you make of it - the gods just set the table.*
